title: HK Solutions' Keith Helmendach Featured in Retirement Film
summary: Keith Helmendach of HK Solutions is featured in 'Retirement Everest,' a film examining the risks of decumulation in retirement planning.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of financial planning and managing retirement funds effectively.

title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves 2 Dead
summary: A mass shooting at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in two fatalities and several injuries. Police are investigating the 'planned fight' that led to the incident.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about public safety and gun violence in the community.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14 at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Promotes advancements and knowledge sharing in polymer science and extrusion technology.

title: South Carolina Leaders Consider Redrawing Congressional Districts
summary: South Carolina leaders are considering redrawing congressional districts ahead of midterm elections, raising concerns about potential impacts on minority voting power.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing debate over fair representation and voting rights.

title: I-77 Crash Near State Line Causes Injuries, Lane Closures
summary: A crash on I-77 North near Westinghouse Boulevard resulted in one person injured and the closure of two lanes.
charlotte_impact: Informs commuters about traffic disruptions and potential delays.

title: I-77 Reopens After Car Fire in Southwest Charlotte
summary: I-77 has reopened after a car fire near the Clanton Road exit caused significant delays in southwest Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Provides updates on traffic conditions and the resolution of disruptions.

title: Union County Foster Mom Urges Others to Open Homes
summary: A Union County foster mom highlights the growing need for foster families and encourages others to consider opening their homes.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness about foster care and the importance of supporting vulnerable children.

title: Shooting, Kidnapping Attempt Reported at Newton Truck Stop
summary: Two armed men approached a vehicle at a Love's Travel Stop in Newton, firing shots and attempting to kidnap a passenger.
charlotte_impact: Reports a violent crime and raises safety concerns for travelers.

title: Missing 73-Year-Old Man from Monroe Found Safe
summary: A 73-year-old man who was reported missing from Monroe on Monday afternoon has been found safe.
charlotte_impact: Provides relief and reassurance to the community regarding the safe return of a missing person.

title: 14-Year-Old Hurt in Hit-and-Run at Charlotte Publix
summary: A 14-year-old boy was injured in a hit-and-run in the parking lot of a Publix on Colwick Road; a suspect has been arrested.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of reckless driving and the importance of pedestrian safety.

title: CMS Board to Vote on Revised Budget Proposal
summary: The CMS Board is set to vote on a revised budget proposal after weeks of debate, facing a tight deadline to meet state requirements.
charlotte_impact: Informs the public about important decisions affecting school funding and resources.

title: Charlotte Rescinds Support for I-77 Toll Lane Project
summary: Charlotte City Council voted to rescind support for the I-77 toll lane project and requested NCDOT to pause the project.
charlotte_impact: Reflects ongoing debates about infrastructure development and its impact on the community.

title: Mecklenburg County Pools Open, Beach Closed for Memorial Day
summary: Mecklenburg County pools and spraygrounds will open for the summer season Memorial Day weekend, but Ramsey Creek Beach remains closed due to drought.
charlotte_impact: Provides information about recreational opportunities and the impact of environmental conditions.

title: Heat Wave Expected After Mild Week
summary: The weather forecast predicts a comfortable and mild week, followed by a heat wave by the weekend.
charlotte_impact: Alerts residents to prepare for upcoming weather changes and potential heat-related risks.

title: Canvas Access Restored for CMS, Cabarrus Schools After Cyberattack
summary: Access to the Canvas learning platform has been restored for Charlotte-Mecklenburg and Cabarrus County schools after a cyberattack.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about cybersecurity and its impact on educational resources.
